# Achi Bala Violin

> Achi Bala is an independent violinist performing Carnatic, film, and world music, based between Chennai, India and Texas, USA. He is the founder of Roopa Fine Arts, a Carnatic music school serving Austin and Houston, Texas, and students online worldwide.

## Roopa Fine Arts — Carnatic music lessons

- [Roopa Fine Arts](https://achibalaviolin.com/roopa-fine-arts/): Carnatic violin lessons, Carnatic vocal lessons, and music theory with exam preparation. In-person lessons in Austin and Houston, Texas; online lessons worldwide. Founded in 2016, built on formal teaching since 2014. Students have completed arangetrams (debut concerts) and won prizes in competition. Contact: roopafinearts@gmail.com.

## The artist

- [Home](https://achibalaviolin.com/): Performances, awards, press, gallery, and studio services (music composition, audio engineering, recording). Contact: achibalaviolin@gmail.com.
- The Waltz of Chennai: an award-winning short film blending violin, dance, and movement across seven Tamil film songs. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=26HeFoJnRlI

## Writing

- [Achritique](https://achibalaviolin.com/achritique/): notes, essays, and criticism by Achi Bala on music and movies.
- [The Lalgudi Bani](https://achibalaviolin.com/achritique/the-lalgudi-bani.html): on Smt. Lalgudi Vijayalakshmi, The Incurable Romantic, and a musical family's meticulous attention to memory, lineage, and documentation.
